query: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS get_impact_analysis(); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_impact_analysis() RETURNS TABLE(initiative_id text, source text, program text, portfolio text, title text, owner text, nature text, sector text, impacted_bu text, impact_justification text, culture text, skills text, skills_desc text, org_design text, org_design_desc text, technology text, technology_desc text, processes text, processes_desc text, overall_impact text, risk text, risk_mitigation text) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t."InitiativeID#",t."Source",t."program",t."Portfolio",t."title",t."owner",t."Nature_on_Impact",t."Sector",t."Impacted_BU",t."Impact_Justification",t."Culture",t."Skills",t."Skills_Description",t."Org_Design",t."Org_Design_Description",t."Technology",t."Technology_Description",t."Processes",t."Processes_Description",t."OverAll_Impact"::text,t."risk",t."Risk_mitigetion" FROM "TMC"."Change - Impact Analysis" t; END; $X$;
